cloudfront.responseheaderspolicy.content:
The policy directives and their values that CloudFront includes as values for the `Content-Security-Policy` HTTP response header.

For more information about the `Content-Security-Policy` HTTP response header, see [Content-Security-Policy](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Security-Policy) in the MDN Web Docs.

cloudfront.responseheaderspolicy.content.Description: The policy directives and their values that CloudFront includes as values for the `Content-Security-Policy` HTTP response header.
A Boolean that determines whether CloudFront overrides the `Content-Security-Policy` HTTP response header received from the origin with the one specified in this response headers policy.
